name: Nasiko Traffic Agent
description: A demo agent that simulates realistic business query analysis with variable latency — designed to make caching benefits immediately visible.

skills.name: Business Query Analysis
skills.description: Analyzes business and data queries, returning structured insights. Demonstrates caching: repeat the same query to see sub-10ms cache hits vs 800-2500ms uncached.
examples: What are the top customer complaints?
Show me the sales breakdown by region
